header.kybVerified: Provider verified through Know Your Business process

description.accessDurationText: Access to this data has a maximum duration of {{days}} days from the approval date.

sample.title: Data Sample
sample.notAvailableDesc: The provider has not provided a data sample for this asset. You can request more technical information by contacting the provider.

policies.title: Access Policies
policies.legalNotice: Legal Notice: By accessing this data, the consumer declares full knowledge and acceptance of the usage policies described above, committing to compliance under the PROCUREDATA governance framework and the Pontus-X network.
defaultPermissions: Analysis and integration into internal systems
defaultProhibitions: Redistribution to third parties without authorization
Use for illegal or discriminatory purposes
defaultObligations: License renewal according to pricing model

data.notAvailableDesc: Data is only available when the transaction is completed.
data.assetAccessDesc: This asset is consumed through the Data Space Access Controller. Data is obtained in real time from the provider's source, ensuring the privacy and security of the exchange.
data.downloadExplain: When downloading, the Access Controller verifies your permissions and securely connects to the provider, delivering updated data without exposing technical credentials.
data.providerNoData: Providers do not receive data, they only send it.
data.holderNoData: Holders custody data but do not consume it directly.
data.switchConsumer: Try switching to a Consumer organization from the top selector.
data.noDataShared: No data has been shared for this transaction yet.

api.title: API Connection Details
api.description: Technical configuration of the data source.

accessHistory.title: Access History
accessHistory.description: Record of your downloads and accesses to this asset.
